password.title: Change Password
password.note: Your other sessions will stay signed in.

sessions.description: Manage devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.title: Active Sessions

linkedAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
linkedAccounts.description: Sign-in methods connected to your account.

sessions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? The device will be signed out immediately.
sessions.revokeOthersConfirm: This will sign out all other devices. Your current session will remain active.

linkedAccounts.unlinkConfirm: You will no longer be able to sign in with {{provider}}.
linkedAccounts.lastMethodTooltip: This is your only sign-in method. Set a password first.

errors.account_taken: This provider account is already linked to another user.
errors.provider_already_linked: This provider is already linked to your account.

backup.title: Backups
backup.subtitle: Manually trigger and restore database backups.
backup.restoreConfirm: This will overwrite the current database with the selected backup. This action is irreversible.

s3.title: S3 Backups
s3.subtitle: Backup and restore from S3-compatible storage.
s3.notConfigured: S3 backup is not configured. Go to Settings → Backup to set it up.
s3.empty: No backups found. Trigger a backup to get started.
s3.restoreError: Failed to restore from S3 backup

local.title: Local Backup
local.subtitle: Backup and restore from the server filesystem.
local.restoreError: Failed to restore from local file

client.title: Client Backup
client.subtitle: Download a live database dump directly to your computer.
client.downloadError: Failed to generate backup for download

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? All execution history will also be deleted.

dialog.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to continue?

api.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
api.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Hold on a moment before retrying.
api.server: The server ran into a problem. Please try again later.
api.validation: Some of the information is invalid.

boundary.description: A grain of sand slipped into the gears. Nothing's broken — give it another try, or head back home.
boundary.title: Oops, that derailed

email.invalidErrorMessage: Please enter a valid email address.

notFound.description: This page must have wandered off between two folders. Shall we walk you back home?
notFound.title: Nothing at this address

rateLimited.description: Too many requests in a short time. Give it a few seconds, then try again.
rateLimited.title: Let's ease off for a moment

home.subtitle: Here's an overview of your application. All systems are running normally.
home.title: Dashboard

actions.clearLogsConfirm: This will permanently delete all audit logs. This action cannot be undone.

logs.subtitle: View system activity and user actions.
logs.title: Logs

clientId.description: Client ID of your OAuth App from <docLink>GitHub Developer settings</docLink>.
clientId.label: GitHub client ID

clientSecret.description: Client secret of your OAuth App from <docLink>GitHub Developer settings</docLink>.
clientSecret.label: GitHub client secret

enable.description: Enables sign-in via GitHub OAuth. Requires a valid client ID and secret from <docLink>GitHub Developer settings</docLink>.
enable.label: Enable login via GitHub

clientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID from your <docLink>Google Cloud Console</docLink> credentials.
clientId.label: Google client ID

clientSecret.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret from your <docLink>Google Cloud Console</docLink> credentials.
clientSecret.label: Google client secret

enable.description: Enables sign-in via Google OAuth. Requires a valid client ID and secret from <docLink>Google Cloud Console</docLink>.
enable.label: Enable login via Google

enable.description: Allows new users to sign up. New accounts can be created freely, without an invitation.
enable.label: Enable user registration

autoLogin.description: Automatically redirects visitors of the login page to the SSO provider, without showing the form. Local sign-in stays reachable at /login?manual=1.
autoLogin.label: Automatic sign-in

buttonLabel.description: Text displayed on the SSO sign-in button of the login page.
buttonLabel.label: Button label

clientId.description: Client ID of the application registered with your identity provider.
clientId.label: SSO client ID

clientSecret.description: Client secret of the application registered with your identity provider.
clientSecret.label: SSO client secret

enable.description: Enables sign-in via an OpenID Connect identity provider (Keycloak, Azure AD, Okta, Authentik…). Users authenticated by the provider are created automatically, even when registration is disabled.
enable.label: Enable login via SSO

issuerUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenID Connect issuer, without the /.well-known/openid-configuration suffix. Register {API_URL}/auth/oauth/sso/callback as the redirect URI on the provider side.
issuerUrl.label: Issuer URL

scopes.description: Space-separated OpenID Connect scopes requested from the provider. The openid scope is always included.
scopes.label: Scopes

appCaption.description: Short tagline shown below the app name in the sidebar.
appCaption.label: Sidebar caption

appName.description: The name displayed in the sidebar and browser tab.
appName.label: Application name

faviconUrl.label: Favicon
faviconUrl.description: Icon shown in the browser tab. PNG recommended (16×16 or 32×32), max 5 MB.

loginHeroSubtitle.description: Supporting text beneath the headline on the login page.
loginHeroSubtitle.label: Login page subtext

loginHeroTitle.description: Large marketing headline on the left panel of the login page.
loginHeroTitle.label: Login page headline

logoUrl.label: App logo
logoUrl.description: Logo shown in the sidebar, login pages and invitations. PNG or JPEG, max 5 MB.

primaryColor.description: OKLCH color string, e.g. oklch(0.61 0.22 42). Overrides the brand accent color.
primaryColor.label: Primary color

enable.description: Send notifications to a Discord channel via webhook. See <docLink>Discord docs</docLink> to create one.
enable.label: Enable Discord

url.description: Incoming webhook URL from your <docLink>Discord server settings</docLink>.
url.label: Discord Webhook URL

enable.description: Send email notifications via an SMTP server.
enable.label: Enable SMTP

fromAddress.description: Email address that appears as the sender for outgoing notifications.
fromAddress.label: From Address

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the SMTP server.
host.label: SMTP Server

password.description: Password for authenticating with the SMTP server.
password.label: Password

port.description: Port used to connect to the SMTP server (e.g. 465, 587).
port.label: SMTP Port

user.description: Username for authenticating with the SMTP server.
user.label: Username

endpoint.label: S3 Endpoint
endpoint.description: URL of the S3-compatible storage endpoint (e.g. https://s3.amazonaws.com). Required to enable document storage.

accessKey.label: Access Key
accessKey.description: S3 access key ID. Stored encrypted — do not share it.

secretKey.label: Secret Key
secretKey.description: S3 secret access key. Stored encrypted — do not share it.

bucket.label: Bucket
bucket.description: Name of the S3 bucket where documents are stored.

secret.description: Secret key used to sign JSON Web Tokens. Regenerating will invalidate all active sessions.
secret.label: JWT Secret

secretField.configured: Configured — enter a new value to replace

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Resend API key used to send transactional emails. Stored encrypted — do not share it.

fromAddress.label: Sender address
fromAddress.description: Email address used as the sender of transactional emails.

fromName.label: Sender name
fromName.description: Display name shown as the sender of transactional emails.

settings.rotateSuccess: Secret regenerated — all active sessions have been invalidated

secretReveal.description: This value will only be shown once. Copy it now and store it securely.
secretReveal.title: Secret generated

settings.subtitle: Configure your application runtime settings.
settings.title: Settings

rotate.confirmDescription: The previous value will be invalidated immediately. Any integrations using it will need to be updated.

actions.deleteInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation? The user will no longer be able to use this link.
actions.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
actions.revokeInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation? The user will no longer be able to use this link.

createApiKey.successDescription: The new API key has been generated. Make sure to copy it and share it with the user securely. This key will not be shown again.

deleteApiKey.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

impersonate.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to impersonate {{name}}? You will be logged in as this user until you stop impersonating.

resetPassword.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to reset this user's password? A new random password will be generated.
resetPassword.successDescription: The new password has been generated. Make sure to copy it and share it with the user securely. This password will not be shown again.

api.description: View and delete active API keys for this user.
api.title: API

edit.title: Edit User
edit.note: These details are visible to the team.

roles.title: Roles
roles.defaultHint: The default role is always assigned and cannot be removed.

sessions.description: View and revoke active sessions for this user.
sessions.title: Sessions

sessions.revokeAllConfirm: This will sign out {{name}} from all devices immediately.
sessions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this session?

danger.description: Deletion permanently removes the user and revokes all their access. This action is irreversible.
danger.title: Danger zone

invite.description: Send an invitation link to a new user. The invitation will expire in 7 days.
invite.shareDescription: Share this link with the user to complete their registration
invite.successDescription: The link has been copied to your clipboard
invite.title: Invite User

imageUpload.urlImportDescription: Paste the public URL of an image (PNG, JPEG, WebP…). The image will be downloaded and stored on our servers.
